intro: Piriqueta australis, also known as the Australian Piriqueta, is a plant species in the Passifloraceae family, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and gastrointestinal disorders, due to its potential health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and modulating the immune system. Piriqueta australis is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
